meaning: n.种族,种族气质,种族特征,赛跑,急流,姜根vi.赛跑,疾走vt.与...赛跑,使空转
examples: He finished fifth in the race.
He crashed midway through the race.
To compete, all the combatants have been stockpiling patents, in something of an arms race.
Iraq's newly designated prime minister, Nouri al-Maliki, is now in a race to form a government.
